title: PPIP -  Dialog after Onboarding - Tap on Share Data
scenario: Verify that after onboarding, tapping "Share Data" on the PPIP dialog enables the share data toggle in Account settings and displays the correct description text.
steps: Start app fresh, go through onboarding, tap "Continue as Guest" → PPIP dialog appears with "Help us improve your experience."
Tap "Share Data" on the dialog, then handle location permission (iOS only) → Dialog closes and Home screen is displayed.

Navigate to App Settings > General > Account → "Share data" toggle is ON with description text about sharing basic device/app info (model, serial number, software version, feature usage) — no personal data shared with third parties.
expected: PPIP (Share Data) dialog appears after onboarding with "Help us improve your experience." Tapping "Share Data" closes the dialog and shows Home screen. In App Settings > General > Account, the "Share data" toggle is ON with description stating basic device/app info (model, serial number, software version, feature usage) is shared and no personal data is shared with third parties.
